info.tagline: Fashion footwear with delivery across Belarus.

Brest: Masherova 17B, TC "Moskva", shops 14 and 27.

info.sourceNotice: Store and legal details are adapted from official public profile.
deliveryBody: We deliver orders in Belarus. Delivery terms depend on city and stock location.
Payment methods: online bank card and available in-store options.
After placing order, manager confirms model, size and delivery details.
returnsBody: You can request return or exchange according to Belarus consumer law.
Keep product condition, package and purchase documents.
Contact manager first to get exact return instructions for your order.
howToOrderBody: Choose model, size and color in catalog.
Add product to cart and complete checkout.
Manager contacts you to confirm order and delivery details.
installmentBody: Installment plans are available for selected products.
Final terms depend on your payment provider and current campaigns.
Contact manager to confirm options before payment.
promotionsBody: Seasonal campaigns and model discounts are available.
Promotion periods are limited and stock may run out quickly.
Check this page and catalog badges for current offers.
aboutBody: GRACIANA is a women's footwear brand focused on modern and wearable models.
We operate stores in Minsk and Brest and support online shopping.
Our team helps with size, fit and model recommendations.

common.freeShipping: Free shipping on orders over 250 BYN

toast.checkoutStock: Not enough stock — please refresh your cart.
toast.checkoutGeneric: Please try again or contact support.
